title: Excalibur - Jewelry (RPG Series) Gem Veins
description: Changes RPG Series' gem vein to match Excalibur's stone and deepslate texture.
body:
A small and simple retexture of [Jewelry (RPG Series)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jewelry)'s gem vein to match [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal)'s stone and deepslate block textures.


![Example image comparing the before and after](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/211c71090353970869783dea987017def8c7800f_0.webp)
